g.text: Chosen: sliding window + SACK bitmap + optional FEC
window=32 bundles | SACK reports gaps | FEC adds k parity shards per group
bitmap: 1100111... | cumulative_ack=B2 | gaps=[B3] | FEC can reconstruct B3 from P1
if FEC recovers gap → no retransmit | else → re-queue B3 for retransmit on next available path
